mapper.select: SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, e.employee_tier AS authorTier, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.equipment_id AS equipmentId, eq.equipment_name AS equipmentName, ka.article_content AS articleContent, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.article_approval_opinion AS articleApprovalOpinion, ka.article_rejection_reason AS articleRejectionReason, ka.article_deletion_reason AS articleDeletionReason, ka.view_count AS viewCount, 0 AS commentCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_edit_history keh WHERE keh.article_id = ka.article_id ) AS reuseCount, ka.is_deleted AS deleted, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM knowledge_bookmark kb WHERE kb.article_id = ka.article_id AND kb.employee_id = #{requesterId} ) AS bookmarked, ka.created_at AS createdAt, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN equipment eq ON ka.equipment_id = eq.equipment_id WHERE ka.article_id = #{articleId}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalArticles, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN ka.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(ka.approved_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(ka.approved_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS newThisMonth, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(ka.view_count), 0), 1) AS averageViewCount, ( COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN ka.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(ka.approved_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(ka.approved_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) - ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article prev_ka LEFT JOIN employee prev_e ON prev_ka.author_id = prev_e.employee_id WHERE prev_ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND prev_ka.is_deleted = false AND prev_ka.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(prev_ka.approved_at) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AND MONTH(prev_ka.approved_at) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ) ) AS newThisMonthChange, ROUND( IFNULL( ( SELECT AVG(cur_ka.view_count) FROM knowledge_article cur_ka LEFT JOIN employee cur_e ON cur_ka.author_id = cur_e.employee_id WHERE cur_ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND cur_ka.is_deleted = false AND cur_ka.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(cur_ka.approved_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(cur_ka.approved_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) ), 0 ) - IFNULL( ( SELECT AVG(prev_ka.view_count) FROM knowledge_article prev_ka LEFT JOIN employee prev_e ON prev_ka.author_id = prev_e.employee_id WHERE prev_ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND prev_ka.is_deleted = false AND prev_ka.approved_at IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(prev_ka.approved_at) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AND MONTH(prev_ka.approved_at) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ), 0 ), 1 ) AS averageViewCountChange FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND ka.is_deleted = false

SELECT ka.author_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, COUNT(*) AS articleCount, COALESCE(SUM(ka.view_count), 0) AS totalViewCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, COALESCE(SUM(ka.view_count), 0) DESC, ka.author_id) AS rank FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND ka.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY ka.author_id, e.employee_name ORDER BY articleCount DESC, totalViewCount DESC, ka.author_id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.view_count AS viewCount, ka.created_at AS createdAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND ka.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY ka.view_count DESC, ka.approved_at DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, e.employee_tier AS authorTier, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.article_content AS articleContent, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.approved_by AS approverId, approver.employee_name AS approverName, ka.article_approval_opinion AS articleApprovalOpinion, ka.article_rejection_reason AS articleRejectionReason, ka.created_at AS createdAt, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id LEFT JOIN employee approver ON ka.approved_by = approver.employee_id WHERE ka.article_id = #{articleId} AND ka.is_deleted = false AND ka.article_status = 'PENDING'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'PENDING' AND ka.is_deleted = false) AS pendingCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'APPROVED' AND ka.is_deleted = false AND YEAR(ka.approved_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(ka.approved_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())) AS approvedThisMonth,
ROUND( IFNULL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status = 'REJECTED' AND ka.is_deleted = false) * 100.0 / NULLIF( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') AND ka.is_deleted = false), 0 ), 0.0 ), 2) AS rejectionRate

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'APPROVED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approvedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN article_status = 'DRAFT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS draftCount FROM knowledge_article WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT ka.article_id AS id, ka.article_title AS title, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt, ka.article_status AS articleStatus FROM knowledge_article ka WHERE ka.author_id = #{authorId} AND ka.is_deleted = false ORDER BY ka.updated_at DESC, ka.created_at DESC LIMIT 3
